write-prd.description: Write your PRD and kick off the orchestrator

samples.name: Start flow
samples.prompt: I want to start the spec2cloud flow, the PRD is already created, lets start with the review process and continue

samples.name: Review PRD
samples.prompt: Review the PRD and flag any gaps, ambiguities, or missing user stories before we proceed

spec-refinement.description: Review PRD through product and technical lenses, split into FRDs

samples.name: Full refinement
samples.prompt: Review my PRD through product and technical lenses, split it into FRDs, and flag any gaps or ambiguities

samples.name: Review FRDs
samples.prompt: Review each FRD with the same rigour as the PRD — ensure every user story has clear acceptance criteria

ux-design.description: Generate interactive HTML wireframe prototypes from FRDs

samples.name: Generate wireframes
samples.prompt: Generate interactive HTML wireframe prototypes from the FRDs and serve them on localhost for review

samples.name: DDD modeling
samples.prompt: Run DDD modeling to produce domain proposals, domain model, and database model with bounded contexts

increment-planning.description: Break FRDs into ordered increments and resolve tech stack

samples.name: Plan increments
samples.prompt: Break the FRDs into ordered increments starting with a walking skeleton, then feature slices

samples.name: Tech stack
samples.prompt: Inventory and research all libraries via live docs, pin versions, and produce tech-stack.md with ADRs

test-scaffolding.description: Derive tests from FRD acceptance criteria before implementation

samples.name: Full test suite
samples.prompt: Derive test suite from FRD acceptance criteria: Gherkin feature files, Playwright e2e tests, Cucumber step definitions, and unit tests

samples.name: Red baseline
samples.prompt: Establish red baseline: verify all new tests fail (proving they are real) and existing tests still pass

samples.name: Contracts
samples.prompt: Generate API contracts, shared TypeScript types, and infrastructure requirements from the test specifications

implementation.description: Implement code in slices (API, Web, Integration) until green

samples.name: Full increment
samples.prompt: Implement the next increment: API slice, Web slice, then integration — run full regression until green

samples.name: API slice
samples.prompt: Implement the API slice: routes, data store, input validation, and make API tests green

samples.name: Web slice
samples.prompt: Implement the Web slice: pages, components, forms, and make frontend tests green

deploy.description: Provision Azure infrastructure and deploy, then run smoke tests
